name: Reese's Peanut Butter Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the crushed graham crackers and powdered sugar.
2. Add the extra chunky peanut butter and melted butter to the mixture.
3. Stir until well combined.
4. Spread the mixture evenly into a 9 x 13 inch buttered baking pan.
5. Melt the chocolate chips separately.
6. Pour the melted chocolate over the top of the mixture in the pan.
7. Place the pan in the refrigerator for 10-15 minutes, or until firm.
8. Remove from the refrigerator and cut into small squares.
